name: @loop-engine/canonical-json
description: Deterministic JSON canonicalization + SHA-256 helpers for tamper-evident artifacts (baseline manifests, loop-definition hashes, source-data digests). Strict by design: rejects inputs that cannot be deterministically serialized (NaN, ±Infinity, oversize integers, lone surrogates, undefined, functions). Apache-2.0 OSS substrate; depended on by @betterdata/loop-engine-baselines and other governance tooling.
